name: craft-api
title: Craft API
description: Search, read, and edit your Craft Docs vault from Raycast via the Craft API. Powered by @1ar/craft-cli.
author: pa1ar

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Craft
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Search across every document in your Craft space

commands.name: daily
commands.title: Open Daily Note
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Open today's daily note in the Craft app

commands.name: add-task
commands.title: Add Task to Inbox
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Add a task to your Craft inbox

commands.name: append-daily
commands.title: Append to Daily Note
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Append a line to today's daily note

commands.name: tasks
commands.title: Craft Tasks
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Browse and manage tasks by scope

commands.name: create-document
commands.title: Create Craft Document
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Create a new document and open it in Craft

commands.name: whoami
commands.title: Craft Space Info
commands.subtitle: Craft API
commands.description: Show connected space, API status, and local store diagnostics

tools.name: search-craft
tools.title: Search Craft
tools.description: Search across every document in the user's Craft vault. Returns documents matching the query with title, snippet, and metadata. Uses local SQLite FTS5 for instant results.

tools.name: get-document
tools.title: Get Document
tools.description: Fetch the full markdown content of a Craft document by ID or title. Reads from local PlainTextSearch JSON for instant results.

tools.name: list-documents
tools.title: List Documents
tools.description: List documents in the user's Craft vault with optional filters (modifiedAfter, isDailyNote, tag). Sorted by last modified.

tools.name: list-daily-notes
tools.title: List Daily Notes
tools.description: List daily notes from the user's Craft vault, sorted by date. Use get-document to read the content of a specific daily note.

tools.name: create-document
tools.title: Create Document
tools.description: Create a new document in the user's Craft vault with optional markdown body. Defaults to unsorted; no folder lookup needed. Returns the new document's ID and a deeplink.

tools.name: append-to-document
tools.title: Append to Document
tools.description: Append markdown content to the end of an existing document (any page, not just daily notes).

tools.name: update-block
tools.title: Update Block (AI)
tools.description: Edit a single block's markdown content in place. Advanced: requires a block ID. Children are preserved.

tools.name: insert-blocks
tools.title: Insert Blocks (AI)
tools.description: Insert markdown at the start or end of a page or daily note. Advanced: requires pageId or date.

tools.name: delete-blocks
tools.title: Delete Blocks (AI)
tools.description: Delete blocks by ID. Destructive: requires confirm=true.

tools.name: delete-document
tools.title: Delete Document
tools.description: Delete one or more documents by ID. Destructive: requires confirm=true.

tools.name: move-document
tools.title: Move Document
tools.description: Move documents to a different folder, or to the unsorted/templates virtual location.

tools.name: list-collections
tools.title: List Collections
tools.description: List collections (database-like blocks) in the user's Craft vault, optionally scoped to a document.

tools.name: get-collection-items
tools.title: Get Collection Items
tools.description: List items (rows) inside a Craft collection with their titles and property values.

tools.name: add-collection-item
tools.title: Add Collection Item
tools.description: Add a new item (row) to a Craft collection with a title and optional properties.

tools.name: update-collection-item
tools.title: Update Collection Item
tools.description: Update the title or properties of a collection item.

tools.name: delete-collection-items
tools.title: Delete Collection Items
tools.description: Delete items (rows) from a Craft collection. Destructive: requires confirm=true.

tools.name: get-collection-schema
tools.title: Get Collection Schema (AI)
tools.description: Fetch a collection's schema (property keys, types, options). Advanced: useful before add-collection-item.

tools.name: create-folder
tools.title: Create Folder
tools.description: Create a folder in the Craft vault, optionally under a parent folder.

tools.name: delete-folder
tools.title: Delete Folder
tools.description: Delete folders by ID. Destructive: requires confirm=true.

tools.name: move-folder
tools.title: Move Folder
tools.description: Move folders to a different parent, or to root.

tools.name: delete-tasks
tools.title: Delete Tasks
tools.description: Delete tasks by ID. Destructive: requires confirm=true. Use update-task to mark done/canceled instead of deleting.

tools.name: search-in-document
tools.title: Search in Document (AI)
tools.description: Search within a single Craft document by regex pattern. Returns matching block IDs and markdown.

tools.name: get-outgoing-links
tools.title: Get Outgoing Links
tools.description: Extract all outgoing block:// link references from a Craft document.

tools.name: add-task
tools.title: Add Task
tools.description: Add a task to the user's Craft vault. Defaults to inbox, but can also add to a daily note or specific document.

tools.name: append-to-daily
tools.title: Append to Daily Note
tools.description: Append markdown content to a daily note (today by default).

tools.name: update-task
tools.title: Update Task
tools.description: Update an existing task: change state (done/canceled), reschedule, or edit text. Get task IDs from list-tasks.

tools.name: list-folders
tools.title: List Folders
tools.description: List all folders in the user's Craft vault as a tree. Use returned folder IDs with create-document.

tools.name: list-tasks
tools.title: List Tasks
tools.description: List tasks by scope (inbox/active/upcoming/logbook/document). Returns task IDs that can be used with update-task.

tools.name: get-backlinks
tools.title: Get Backlinks
tools.description: Find documents that link to a specific Craft document via title-based search.

tools.name: get-space-info
tools.title: Get Space Info
tools.description: Get diagnostic information about the connected Craft space: API status, local store availability, space name, ID, timezone, document count.

preferences.name: craftUrl
preferences.title: Craft API URL
preferences.description: Full URL to the Craft API, including /api/v1 suffix
